allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; $r = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { "DOWN" }; "dev server: $r")

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:sheets','verify:chars','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러" })
PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars','verify:chance'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; npm run typecheck; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:chance','verify:sheets','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:bloodoath','verify:chance','verify:sheets','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:devices','verify:bloodoath','verify:chance','verify:sheets','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })
PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:talk','verify:chars','verify:devices','verify:ai'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; npm run typecheck; if \($?\) { $env:QUEENING_DETERMINISTIC="1"; $env:QUEENING_ABLATE="bloodoath,devices,topics"; npm run simulate -- A 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "ablation|즉위|최종 자원|단서:|진실|섭정:"; Remove-Item Env:QUEENING_ABLATE; Remove-Item Env:QUEENING_DETERMINISTIC })

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; $env:QUEENING_DETERMINISTIC="1"; $a = npm run simulate -- A 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "즉위|최종 자원|단서:"; $b = npm run simulate -- A 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "즉위|최종 자원|단서:"; Remove-Item Env:QUEENING_DETERMINISTIC; if \(\($a -join "`n"\) -eq \($b -join "`n"\)\) { "DETERMINISTIC: 두 실행 완전 동일" } else { "DIFFER"; Compare-Object \($a -split "`n"\) \($b -split "`n"\) | Select-Object -First 10 })
PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; $env:QUEENING_ABLATION_REPLAY="1"; npm run verify:ablation 2>&1 | Select-Object -Skip 3; Remove-Item Env:QUEENING_ABLATION_REPLAY)

PowerShell(cd c:\\queening; npm run typecheck; foreach \($t in @\('verify','verify:devices','verify:bloodoath','verify:chance','verify:sheets','verify:talk','verify:romance','verify:chars','verify:providers','verify:ai','verify:flags','verify:fallback'\)\) { "=== $t ==="; npm run $t 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAIL|런타임 에러|콘솔" })
